name: Xingye Leather Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Xingye Leather Technology Co., Ltd. provides shoe leather materials in China. The company offers napa, natural wrestling, and special effects series products. Its products are used in leather shoes, luggage, leather goods, leather furniture, and other manufacturing applications. Xingye Leather Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Jinjiang, China.
